name: Mujde Doenyas - The Heart Asks Pleasure First “The Piano”/ Michael Nyman-piano
description: Among the film music genre there are some piano gems and this is one of them. Michael Nyman’s score to the 1993 Jane Campion film “The Piano” Composed by: Michael Nyman Painting by: Arzu Yazıcı Art Gallery: Lucafineart Video recording & Post production: Ekin Yüce
